# The5th Consulting

> The5th Consulting helps experienced coaches, consultants, and experts turn a lifetime of expertise into a premium, predictable business — without ads, funnels, or chasing a following. Founded by Indrodip Ghosh, who has advised Fortune 500 leaders and billion-dollar companies; clients have generated $15M+ across 12 countries.

## About
- **Brand:** The5th Consulting (also "The5th")
- **Founder:** Indrodip Ghosh — Founder & Marketing Growth Consultant
- **What they do:** Package, price, and sell your expertise into a premium offer that produces consistent, high-value clients.
- **Signature method:** The Client-to-Cash Method™ / the 10K Roadmap — Package → Position → Attract → Close.
- **Who it's for:** experienced coaches, consultants, therapists, executives, and subject-matter experts.
- **Notable results (individual, not typical):** Torill — $210,000 from a single launch; Laurie — $14,193 in 60 days; Gurpreet — $18,000 in 3 months from $0.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://the5th.consulting/): Overview of The5th Consulting and how they help experts turn expertise into income.
- [About & Podcast](https://the5th.consulting/about): The mission, story, and founder Indrodip Ghosh; The5th Podcast.
- [Book a Call](https://the5th.consulting/call): Watch the film, then apply for a private strategy call.
- [Fast Forward](https://the5th.consulting/fast-forward): The done-with-you program to launch a premium offer.
- [The Collective](https://the5th.consulting/collective): The community/membership.
- [The5th AI](https://the5th.consulting/ai): AI business coach that reads your business and builds a 90-day roadmap.
- [Free Business Growth Quiz](https://the5th.consulting/quiz): Discover what's capping your income and your fastest path to $10K months.
- [Member Platform](https://platform.the5th.consulting/): The5th member platform (login).
